hero.name: Ron Chang
hero.description: I love shipping software that solves real problems. I focus on the web stack, developer experience and the small details that make a product feel great.

about.title: Turning ideas into shipped products
about.paragraph1: I work mostly in the Vue / Nuxt ecosystem and I'm comfortable across TypeScript, Node.js and cloud deployments. I like starting from the user and keeping things simple.
about.paragraph2: Off the clock I build small tools, read, and wander around. This site is where I collect my work, experiments and notes.

items.name: Personal Site
items.description: This site — built with Nuxt 4 and Tailwind v4, with full i18n support.
